abstract: "Elasticity measures how responsive one variable is to changes in another. This post walks through the intuition and the math behind price elasticity of demand."
---

# What Is Elasticity?

Elasticity is a measure of responsiveness. When the price of coffee rises by 10%, how much does quantity demanded fall? That ratio is the price elasticity of demand.

# Why It Matters

Elasticity determines who bears the burden of a tax, how firms set prices, and whether a market clears quickly or slowly.
